label: Fix: restore feedback1.startpulse expression (SA was not integrating) + sphere-scale Pulse page + audio-defaults bump
context: Cloud was static despite Play=True / Timescale=1.0. Sampling positions over 30 frames showed zero delta. Root cause: cleared sa1/feedback1.par.startpulse.expr in move_001 (was 'parent.POPX.par.Startpulse', looked orphan but resolved via sa1.par.parentshortcut='POPX'). Without that expression the Startpulse never forwards from sa1 to feedback1 — integration never kicks off.

operations.before: (empty — cleared in move_001 thinking it was orphan)
operations.notes: POPX SA module's parentshortcut='POPX' makes 'parent.POPX' resolve to sa1 itself. Expression forwards sa1.Startpulse pulses to the internal feedback1 (the actual integrator). Without it, integration never begins.
Now forwards to feedback1 — integration starts
Energy-driven sphere scale. Drops grow particles.
ABSOLUTE path — sphere_template is inside geo_attractor, so 'ctrl_master' would resolve to a sibling of sphere (None). Use '/project1/ctrl_master'.
Bumped baseline so SA is always visibly evolving even at Energy=0 (Timescale 1.0 instead of 0.1). Peak Timescale now 2.5.
Audio binding unwired — Energy is a manual slider now for testing/tuning. Re-bind when ready to test live audio reactivity.

verified: SA particles advect continuously — pt[0] moved (0.68, -0.77, 1.06) → (1.14, 0.15, 1.01) over 30 frames
Cloud sculpts into Aizawa pattern (denser center, dispersed outer)
Bilateral mirror reads as two iris-like blobs facing each other
Energy slider drives both Timescale AND sphere radius
new_gotcha: POPX modules use parent.<shortcut> references internally (e.g. 'parent.POPX.par.Startpulse'). Shortcut comes from sa1.par.parentshortcut='POPX'. These expressions look orphan-style after copying the module to a new project but ARE correct — clearing them breaks the internal pulse forwarding chain. Promote to TD_BUILD_LOG correction tracker.
